steps.title: Move all terms together
steps.content:
Expand and subtract $55$ from both sides:
+$$55=x^2+6x$$
+$$x^2+6x-55=0$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph or solve the equation +$$\frac{55}{x+6}=x$$ +The factored form is +$$x^2+6x-55=(x+11)(x-5)$$ +so the positive solution is selected. The answer is 5.
